msContents.summary: A Manipravalam commentary on the Amarakoṣa.

body.p:
amarasihmaṉeṉṟu peyarai yuṭaiya mahāmahopādhyā
yarāṉavar sakalanighaṇṭunaḷaiyum viśadatamāka aṟintu koṇṭu atē prakāraṃ aṟiya vēṇum yeṉkiṟa vapekṣā
rūpamāṉa adhikārasaṃpattiyai yuṭaiya sakalajanaṃgaḷukkuṃ anekaparyyāyanāmaṃgaḷai liṃgaviśeṣanirṇṇaya
tuṭaṉ sulabhamāka aṟivikka vēṇumeṉṟum apekṣaiyai yuṭaiyarāy koṇṭu tammālē ceyyappaṭap pōkiṟa nāmaliṃgānuśā
sanameṉkiṟa nighaṇṭuviṉuṭaiya avighnaparisamāptyartthamākavum · addhyetākkaḷeṉṉa addhyāpayitākkaḷeṉṉa · grandhameṉṉa ivai muta
lāṉatukaḷuṭaiya uttarottaraviśeṣasamṛddhyartthamākavum samastajanaṅkaḷukkum uddeśyamāyum iṣṭamāyum yirukki
ṟa sakalaphalapradaparamātmanamaskārattai tām anuṣṭitu parāḷumanuṣṭhikku kaikkāka paropadeśaṃ paṇṇukiṟār · yasyeti
ślokattālē |

ṭīkā | jñānadayāsindhoḥ samastartthaviṣayakamāṉa jñānaṃ mutalākiya vapekṣitārtthaṃkaḷeṉṉa
avaiṟṟai upakarikkukaikka vēṇṭiya dayai yeṉṉa · ivaiṟṟukku adhāranāyiruppāṉāyi · agādhasya kīḻcolliyavai
naṉakkuṇṭāyik kūṭāta svabhāvamākiṟa gāṃbhīryyattaiyuṭaiyaṉāyirukkiṟa · yasya · lokavedavedāntatadupa
brahmaņādikaḷilē guṇavigrahavibhūtyaiśvaryyādikaḷeṉṉa · parabrahma · paramātma · paramapuruṣa · puruṣottama · nārāyaṇādisāmānya
viśeṣaśabdaṃkaḷeṉṉa · ivaittālē prasiddhaṉāyiruntuḷḷa · yātoru śrīyaḥ patiyiṉuṭaiya guṇāḥ āśrayaṇopayōgikaḷāyum
āśrita kāryyopayōgikaḷāyum anubhavaparikaraṃkaḷāyumiruttuḷḷa vāsalyādyasaṃkhyeyakalyāṇaguṇaṅkaḷāṉatukaḷ
anaghāḥ āśritaviṣayaṃkaḷile nirdduṣṭaṃkaḷāka prakāśikkiṟatukaḷō aṉṟikkē · guṇāḥ addhyetākkaḷuṭaiya prakṛtagrandhārtthajñānapra
dānopayogikaḷāṉa · niravadhikaniratiśayadivyakalyāṇaguṇaṅkaḷāṉatukaḷ anaghāḥ · āśritaviṣayatilē tēṉumo
ṉṟai yapekṣikkai yākiṟa · aghamuṇṭu doṣaṃ atillātatukaḷāka prakāśiyyāṉirukkiṟatukaḷō - akṣayaḥ jñānapradatva
millāmai yākiṟa kṣayamuṇṭu nāśaṃ atilātavanavaṉāyirukkiṟa · saḥ · kīḻcolliya paṭi prasiddhaṉāyikukkiṟ anta śriyaḥ pati
yāṉavaṉ · he dhīrāḥ · prakṛtagrandhārtthajñānaṃ mutalākiya saṃpadādikaḷai koṭuppaṉāveṉkiṟa saṃdehamillāmal kī
ḻcolliya guṇātiśayaṅkaḷaiyuṭaiyaṉākaiyāl mēl colla pōkiṟa saṃpadādikaḷaikkoṭuppaṉeṉkiṟa nampikkaiyākiṟa dhairyyattaiyu
ṭaiyavar_kaḷē · śriyai ca · prakṛtagrandhārtthajñānapūrvakavedādisakalagrandhārtthajñānattiṉ poruṭṭum · amṛtāya ca · anta jñānaviro
dhiyāna vajñānamākiṟa mṛtiyuṇṭu · maraņaṃ · atillāmaiyākiṟa avāntarapuruṣārtthapūrvakaniratiśayānandarūpamahāpuru
ṣārtthattiṉ poruṭṭum · sevyatāṃ · uṅkaḷālē ābhimukhyamātṛ āsūcakamāṉa manovākkāyaṅkaḷilētēṉum oru karaņattā
lē āśrayikkattakkavaṉ · aṉṟikkē taṅkaḷuṭaiya vadhikārapauṣkalyasūcakamāṉa trividhakaraņaṅkaḷālum āśra
yikkattakkavaṉ · āka vittāl nāmaliṃgānuśāsanameṉkiṟa prakṛtagrandhāddhyetākkaḷuṭaiya jñānasamṛddhyādika
ḷeṉṉa · tatprayuktamāṉa vaihīkāmuṣmikaniratiśayānandarūpaparamapuruṣārtthameṉṉa · ivaittiṉuṭaya pra
dānādyupayuktaṅkaḷāṉa niravadhikajñānadayākṣāntyādikaḷāl puṣkalaṉāyirūppaṉeṉṟum cetanaprayatna
ttāl sujñeyasvarūpaṉādurjñeyasvarūpaṉāyirunta pōtilum svaprayatnattāl sujñeyasvarūpaṉāyirūppaṉeṉṟum vakṣyamāṇa
samāśrayaṇādyupayuktamāṉa nikhilakalyāņaguṇākaraṉeṉṟum agguṇaṅkaḷukku virodhikaḷāṉa heyaguṇapratibhaṭaṉeṉṟum
colili nityanāyi prasiddhaṉāṉa anta śrīmannārāyaņan apekṣitasakalapuruṣārtthattiṉ poruṭṭu trividhakaraņaṅkaḷālum
āśrayaņiyyaṉeṉṟu colli talaikkaṭṭittu |
